Thanks for being a part of this with me, Maria. I appreciate your support.

[turn_id=conv-41_conv_session_32_D32:14; speaker=Maria; listener=John; session_time=11:08 am on 16 August, 2023]
Hey John, I'm here for you. Last Friday, I spent some time at the shelter volunteering at the front desk. Seeing the smiles on their faces when they got food or a bed really made me feel good. We have the power to make a difference in people's lives.

[turn_id=conv-41_conv_session_32_D32:15; speaker=John; listener=Maria; session_time=11:08 am on 16 August, 2023]
Maria, I'm glad you're finding fulfillment there. It's amazing how a little kindness can have such a big impact on someone's life. Let's continue making a difference in our community!

[turn_id=conv-41_conv_session_32_D32:16; speaker=Maria; listener=John; session_time=11:08 am on 16 August, 2023]
Yeah, John! Let's keep spreading kindness. It's awesome to know we can bring joy and comfort to those who need it.
